title: YELKO Under Cabinet Lights, 116LEDs Rechargeable Motion Sensor Light Indoor, 3200mAh 15.8inch Battery Operated Closet Light bar, Cordless Dimmable Under Counter Lights for for Kitchen (Two Pack)
features: 【Decently bright, Motion sensor functions perfectly】 The light has three settings, Always On so it stays on until you shut it off, Day Auto the light comes on when during the day time when motion is detected, and Night Auto that comes on only at night when motion is detected,The light shuts off after 30 seconds when there is no motion. This under cabinet light is perfect for under a kitchen cabinet, in a closet, a garage, or pretty much anywhere you need it.

【3 Color Temperatures, 5 Levels of Brightness】The rechargeable motion sensor closet lights has three different temperature level((3000 [warm], 4500 [natural], or 6000 [cool]) to give you the light you like and to adjust the brightness of the light with button control on the light which is five levels of brightness. 20%, 40%, 60% 80%, and 100% and and the lighted indicator tells which one you've selected

【USB_C Charging,Super-Long Battery】 YELKO motion cabinet lights has an impressive 3200mAh Battery that has been going strong for several days, which means less recharging.that all of the controls have indicator lights showing what your settings are. There's even a lighted battery indicator scale, which tells you how much of a charge you have left.The display blinks while charging.

【Strong Magnetic, Easier to installation】 The light is magnetic and can easily be mounted to any magnetic surface or mounted on a non magnetic surface with the magnetic sticky back plates that come with the light,There are 2 U-shaped magnet symbols on the back of the light that show you where to place the adhesive metal mounts

【LED status indicators,Motion Cabinet Lights】 Yelko under cabinet lights show you everything is very clearly marked on the face of the light near the sensor.that all of the controls have indicator lights showing what your settings are.this under cabinet light is the perfect thing to give you a bright light where you need it
description: Product Description YELKO Rechargeable Under Cabinet Lights Brighter Your Kitchen With Motion Sensor Closet Lights YELKO Under cabinet lighting provides useful illumination for everyday tasks, such as preparing ingredients, locating the right tool reading, sorting or measuring. It enhances highly functional spaces, no matter what time of day, while adding a touch of ambiance to the decor. YELKO LED under cabinet fixtures can be installed two different ways: either direct attached to any iron surface by build-in strong magnet or stick on the iron sheet for installation closer to the wall. Motion Sensor Cabinet lights Battery Operated Cabinet Lighting Specification Color of light: 3 Color Optional LED Quantities: 116LEDs Color Temp:3000K/4500K/6000k Luminous Flux: 300Lumen Battery Capacity: 3200mAh Why Choose YELKO Under Cabinet lights The rechargeable under cabinet lighting produces 300Lumens of brightness—more than enough for kitchen tasks. The motion sensor cabinet light is a warm white, flattering to anything it illuminates. LED status indicators Decently bright 300Lumens Build-in 3200mAh Rechargeable battery 3 Color Temperatures Optional 5 Levels of Brightness Strong Magnetic, Easier to installation YELKO under cabinet lighting are energy efficient and long battery life. it is the perfect solution for a varied assortment of lighting applications Under cabinet lights not only provide additional light to your workspace, they also increase the functionality of your cabinets. By illuminating the interior of your cabinets, you can easily see what's inside, making it easier to find what you're looking for and reducing clutter. Furthermore, under cabinet lights can also be used to highlight specific items, such as artwork, collectibles, or other decorative elements, adding to the aesthetic appeal of your space under cabinet lights are a versatile and practical solution for adding light to your cabinets, increasing functionality, and enhancing the look and feel of your space. With easy installation, customizable options, and energy-efficient LED technology, they are a must-have for any kitchen, bathroom, or workspace.

specifications_table.Room Type: Bathroom, Kitchen, Laundry Room, Living Room, Storage Room
specifications_table.Other Special Features of the Product: Adjustable Colour Temperature, Colour Changing, Energy Efficient, Motion Sensor
